contact_form.name: Contact Form Confirmation
contact_form.subject: Thank you for reaching out to The Nailaa Studio
contact_form.title: We Have Received Your Message
contact_form.body:
Dear {{CLIENT_NAME}},

Thank you for contacting The Nailaa Studio. Our design curators have received your message and will review your request shortly.

Here is a copy of your inquiry:

{{MESSAGE}}

We typically respond within 24-48 business hours. In the meantime, feel free to browse our latest projects.

consultation_popup.name: Consultation Inquiry Confirmation
consultation_popup.subject: Your Design Consultation with The Nailaa Studio
consultation_popup.title: Intake Consultation Received
consultation_popup.body:
Dear {{CLIENT_NAME}},

Thank you for submitting your details for a bespoke design consultation. We are excited to collaborate and bring your design space to life.

One of our lead designers will be in touch with you shortly to schedule your session.

booking_confirmation.name: Booking Confirmation
booking_confirmation.subject: Booking Confirmed - The Nailaa Studio
booking_confirmation.title: Your Booking is Confirmed
booking_confirmation.body:
Dear {{CLIENT_NAME}},

We are delighted to confirm your session booking with The Nailaa Studio. Our team is preparing to deliver a premium luxury experience.

If you need to make any changes or reschedule, please reply directly to this email or call our team.

admin_notification.name: Admin Notification
admin_notification.subject: New Lead Submitted - The Nailaa Studio
admin_notification.title: New Lead Inquiry Alert
admin_notification.body:
Attention Admin,

A new lead has been submitted on the website. Here are the submission details:

Name:{{CLIENT_NAME}}
Email:{{CLIENT_EMAIL}}
Message:{{MESSAGE}}

Please log in to the admin dashboard to review and follow up immediately.
